pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. I know we're all here for the same reason—trying to win something important. I've got a lot riding on this, and I'm guessing you do too. What brings you here today?

Yeah, hey B. Look, I'm not gonna sugarcoat it—my family and I just got evicted. We found a place we can actually afford, but we need $30k for the deposit and first two months. This game is kind of our shot right now, you know? What about you—what's your situation?

Man, that's rough—I'm sorry you're going through that. My daughter, she's three, needs surgery and we're still $25k short after everything. So yeah, I get it—this game is literally life or death for us too. How many kids do you have?
I've got two kids—they're five and eight. Man, your daughter's surgery... that's heavy. I really hope you get what you need. We're all fighting for something real here, aren't we?

Yeah, we really are. And your kids need stability just like my daughter needs that surgery—it's all life-changing stuff. I appreciate that, man. So when you get that place sorted, what's the first thing you want to do with your family there?

Honestly? Just... breathe, you know? Get them settled in their own space, let them have a normal routine again. Maybe make them a real home-cooked meal at our own table. They've been through a lot these past months. What about you—once your daughter gets that surgery, what's the first thing you want to do with her?

Man, that hits home. Honestly, I just want to see her run around without pain, you know? Maybe take her to the park, push her on the swings like a normal dad. She's been so brave through all this, and I can't wait to give her that back.
That's beautiful, man. She's lucky to have a dad who cares that much. I really hope you get there—both of us do. We're gonna make it through this.
Thanks, man. That means a lot. And hey, your kids are gonna have that stable home—I can feel it. We've both got this. Let's both walk out of here with what we need.
Yeah, man. We got this. Good luck in there—I really mean it. Your daughter's gonna be swinging in that park soon.
Thanks, brother. And your kids are gonna have that home and that table to eat at together. We both deserve this. Let's go get it.
